name: Mike Ezell
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $78,922 for Mike Ezell in U.S. House, MS-04. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
